tools.name: deploy_ai_landing_zone_advanced
tools.description: Deploy Advanced Landing Zone — multi-region Bicep with management groups, Azure Firewall, NAT Gateway, DNS zones, Azure Policy, Defender for Cloud. Use when: deploy, provision, configure enterprise infrastructure.

tools.name: evaluate_ai_landing_zone_advanced
tools.description: Evaluate Advanced Landing Zone — audit Azure Policy compliance, Defender score, network segmentation, RBAC least-privilege, CIS/NIST benchmarks. Use when: evaluate, audit, compliance check.

tools.name: tune_ai_landing_zone_advanced
tools.description: Tune Advanced Landing Zone — optimize SKU right-sizing, region selection, policy effects (Audit vs Deny), reserved instances, Firewall rules, cost governance. Use when: tune, optimize, cost review.
